name: NLC ForestPortal & LGIS (Národné lesnícke centrum)
operator: Národné lesnícke centrum (National Forest Centre), Zvolen
dataType: Forest management plans, spatial forest units (JPRL), orthophotos, LiDAR, forest change detection from satellite imagery
temporalResolution: 10-year forest management cycle; satellite change detection updated seasonally
formats: Shapefile, WMS, WFS, web map viewer
description: Slovakia's National Forest Centre provides forestry GIS data through ForestPortal and LGIS/ISLHP web applications, including forest management units, orthophotos, LiDAR data and satellite-based forest change monitoring.

name: SAŽP Enviroportál (Slovak Environment Agency)
operator: Slovenská agentúra životného prostredia (SAŽP)
dataType: Environmental indicators, contaminated sites, waste, EIA/SEA assessments, state-of-environment reports
description: The Slovak Environment Agency's information portal providing verified environmental data, contaminated site registers, EIA databases, and annual state-of-environment reports since 1992.

name: SVP Water Management Portal (Slovenský vodohospodársky podnik)
operator: Slovenský vodohospodársky podnik, š.p.
dataType: Flood hazard maps, flood risk maps, water infrastructure, river basin management data
spatialResolution: varies; flood maps at catchment scale
temporalResolution: 6-year flood risk cycle (EU Directive 2007/60/ES); continuous water level updates
description: Slovakia's state water management enterprise providing flood hazard and flood risk maps, water level data and river management information through an ArcGIS-based map portal.

name: ŠOP SR Nature Conservation Maps & Biomonitoring
operator: Štátna ochrana prírody Slovenskej republiky (ŠOP SR)
dataType: Protected areas, Natura 2000 sites, RAMSAR wetlands, biosphere reserves, protected trees, species monitoring
description: Interactive map of Slovakia's State Nature Conservancy showing protected areas, Natura 2000 sites, RAMSAR wetlands, biosphere reserves and protected trees, complemented by the biomonitoring.sk species monitoring system.

name: data.gov.sk – Slovak Open Data Portal
operator: Národná agentúra pre sieťové a elektronické služby (NASES)
dataType: Multi-thematic open datasets including geospatial, environmental, transport, statistical data
formats: CSV, JSON, XML, RDF, Shapefile, GeoJSON
description: Slovakia's national CKAN-based open data catalogue with over 9,900 datasets from public institutions, featuring SPARQL endpoint and high-value dataset tagging.

name: SHMÚ Air Quality Monitoring Network
operator: Slovenský hydrometeorologický ústav (SHMÚ)
dataType: Hourly pollutant concentrations (PM10, PM2.5, SO2, NOx, O3, CO, benzene, heavy metals, PAH), CMAQ air quality forecasts
spatialResolution: 53 automatic monitoring stations; CMAQ gridded forecasts
description: Real-time and archival air quality data from 53 automatic monitoring stations across Slovakia, plus CMAQ model forecasts for PM10, PM2.5, NO2, and O3.

name: SHMÚ Hydrological Service – River Water Levels
operator: Slovenský hydrometeorologický ústav (SHMÚ)
dataType: River water levels, discharge, water temperature, groundwater levels, water quality, water balance
description: Operational hydrological data from Slovakia's national gauging network including real-time river levels, discharge measurements, groundwater monitoring and water quality assessments.

name: AgriMeteo.lu – ASTA Agrometeorological Network
operator: Administration des Services Techniques de l'Agriculture (ASTA)
dataType: Temperature, rainfall, wind, humidity, soil moisture, crop-specific monitoring and forecast models
description: Luxembourg's agrometeorological network of 41 automatic stations providing hourly weather data, crop-specific monitoring models, and agricultural forecasts since 1949.

name: MNHNL Biodiversity Data Portal
operator: Musée National d'Histoire Naturelle Luxembourg (MNHNL)
dataType: Species observations, specimen collections, citizen science records (iNaturalist, ornitho.lu), GBIF-integrated data
description: Luxembourg's national biodiversity data aggregator operated by the Natural History Museum, integrating museum collections, iNaturalist, ornitho.lu and GBIF data into a searchable species observation portal.

name: AGE Water Management & Flood Portal (inondations.lu)
operator: Administration de la Gestion de l'Eau (AGE)
dataType: Real-time water levels, flood forecasts (24-48h), flood alerts, hydrometric station data, water quality
spatialResolution: station-level (hydrometric network across Sûre, Alzette, Moselle catchments)
formats: HTML, web map, WMS (111 INSPIRE datasets)
description: Luxembourg's flood forecasting centre providing 15-minute water level updates and 24-48h flood forecasts for major catchments, with 111 INSPIRE-compliant hydrography datasets accessible via the national geoportal.

name: Service Géologique du Luxembourg (geologie.lu)
operator: Service Géologique de l'État / Administration des Ponts et Chaussées
dataType: Geological maps, reference borehole logs, geological unit thicknesses, hydrogeological data
formats: WMS, PDF (geological bulletins), vector data via geoportail.lu
description: Luxembourg's geological survey portal providing geological maps, deep borehole reference data, geological unit attributes and hydrogeological information, integrated into the national geoportal under the Geosciences theme.

name: Luxembourg LPIS/FLIK Agricultural Parcel Data
operator: Administration des Services Techniques de l'Agriculture (ASTA)
dataType: Agricultural parcel boundaries, land cover classification, crop type, landscape features
apiProtocol: WMS, WFS (INSPIRE Annex II Land Cover)
description: Luxembourg's Land Parcel Identification System providing annual INSPIRE-compliant agricultural parcel reference data with crop types and landscape features under CC0 public domain dedication.

name: Luxembourg Air Quality Monitoring (emwelt.lu)
operator: Administration de l'Environnement
dataType: Real-time pollutant concentrations (O3, NO2, PM10, PM2.5, SO2), air quality index, forecasts
description: Real-time air quality measurements from Luxembourg's telemetric monitoring stations in rural, urban and traffic environments, with pollutant forecasts and air quality index published on the emwelt.lu environmental portal.

name: VEGA-PRO Satellite Vegetation Monitoring (IKI RAS)
operator: Space Research Institute (IKI), Russian Academy of Sciences
dataType: Near-real-time satellite vegetation indices (NDVI, EVI), crop state, fire-affected areas, land cover from MODIS/VIIRS archives
description: IKI's professional satellite service providing daily-updated vegetation monitoring across Northern Eurasia using MODIS and VIIRS data, with tools for agriculture, forestry and fire impact assessment.

name: AARI Sea Ice Data (Arctic & Antarctic Research Institute)
operator: Arctic and Antarctic Research Institute (AARI), Roshydromet
dataType: Sea ice charts, ice concentration, fast ice extent, stages of ice development, historical ice edge data
description: World Data Centre-B for Sea Ice at AARI providing operational and historical sea ice charts for the Arctic and Antarctic, with data records extending back to 1933.

name: Rosgeolfond (Russian Federal Geological Fund)
operator: FGBU Rosgeolfond / Federal Agency for Mineral Resources (Rosnedra)
dataType: Geological reports, borehole logs, mineral resource assessments, subsurface geological information
description: Russia's Federal Geological Fund maintaining the national archive of geological reports, borehole data and mineral resource assessments, with partial public access through the rfgf.ru portal.

name: ISDM-Rosleskhoz Forest Fire Remote Monitoring System
operator: FBU Avialesookhrana / Federal Agency for Forestry (Rosleskhoz)
dataType: Active fire detections (thermal anomalies), burned area, fire danger indices, firefighting resource allocation
description: Russia's national forest fire remote monitoring information system using MODIS, VIIRS and Meteor-M satellite data to provide daily fire detection and burned area mapping across all of the Russian Federation.

name: Rosvodresursy – Federal Water Resources Agency Portal
operator: Federal Agency for Water Resources (Rosvodresursy)
dataType: State water cadastre, water body registry, surface/groundwater accounting, water monitoring data, water use contracts
description: Portal of Russia's Federal Water Resources Agency providing the state water cadastre, water body registry, surface and groundwater accounting data and water use contract information.

name: RIHMI-WDC Climate Data Archive (meteo.ru)
operator: VNIIGMI-MCD (All-Russian Research Institute of Hydrometeorological Information – World Data Centre), Roshydromet
dataType: Monthly/daily temperature, precipitation, station metadata, historical climate series from former-USSR stations
spatialResolution: station-level (hundreds of stations across Russia/former USSR)
description: Russia's World Data Centre for Meteorology in Obninsk providing long-term climate archives from hundreds of stations across Russia and the former USSR, with records beginning in 1881.

name: IKI-Monitoring Center for Collective Use (satellite archives)
operator: Space Research Institute (IKI), Russian Academy of Sciences
dataType: Multi-sensor satellite archives (35+ instruments), MODIS, VIIRS, Landsat, Meteor-M, Resurs-P imagery
cost: free for Russian scientific organizations (registration required)
license: free for scientific use (registration required; access may be restricted for non-Russian users)
description: IKI's 2.5+ petabyte satellite data archive providing online access to data from 35+ Earth observation instruments for scientific research, covering over 27% of global land surface.
